allow: PowerShell(winget --version 2>$null; Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs"; \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count; Test-Path "C:\\Users\\Administrator\\scoop\\shims\\node.exe")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs","$env:APPDATA\\npm","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm","$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 FullName)

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; Write-Host "node:"; \(Get-Command node\).Source; Write-Host "npm:"; \(Get-Command npm\).Source; Write-Host "version:"; node --version; npm --version)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm\\node.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs\\current\\node.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Volta\\bin\\node.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Host "---nvm dirs---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---PATH---"; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|nvm|volta|fnm' })

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; @\('choco','scoop','winget','msiexec'\) | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-Command $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "{0} => {1}" -f $_, $c.Source } else { "$_ => NOT FOUND" } }; Write-Host "---tls---"; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol; Write-Host "---arch---"; $env:PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Scanning registry for Node install ==="; @\('HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall','HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\WOW6432Node\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall','HKCU:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall'\) | ForEach-Object { Get-ChildItem $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p.DisplayName -match 'Node'\) { "{0}  v{1}  =>  {2}" -f $p.DisplayName, $p.DisplayVersion, $p.InstallLocation } } }; Write-Host "`n=== Searching disk for node.exe ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\,D:\\ -Filter node.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Force -Depth 6 | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.FullName\)  \($\($_.Length\) bytes\)" })

PowerShell($nodeDir = 'D:\\New Folder'; Write-Host "=== absolute-path sanity ==="; & "$nodeDir\\node.exe" --version; & "$nodeDir\\npm.cmd" --version; Write-Host "=== adding to USER PATH \(Machine PATH untouched\) ==="; $userPath = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); if \($userPath -split ';' -notcontains $nodeDir\) { $newUserPath = if \($userPath\) { "$userPath;$nodeDir" } else { $nodeDir }; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\('Path', $newUserPath, 'User'\); Write-Host "Added $nodeDir to User PATH" } else { Write-Host "$nodeDir already in User PATH" }; Write-Host "=== updated User PATH ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\))

PowerShell(Remove-Item 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\node-v22.22.2-x64.msi' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "MSI removed"; Write-Host "`n=== Refreshing current shell PATH so npm works here too ==="; $env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); \(Get-Command node\).Source; \(Get-Command npm\).Source)

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); node --version; npm --version; Write-Host "=== npm install ==="; npm install --no-audit --no-fund 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); & 'D:\\New Folder\\npm.cmd' --version; Write-Host "=== npm install \(tail only\) ==="; & 'D:\\New Folder\\npm.cmd' install --no-audit --no-fund 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "After unset: ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=[$env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE]"; & 'D:\\New Folder\\npm.cmd' run dev 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; where.exe node 2>$null; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node' })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe','C:/Program Files \(x86\)/nodejs/node.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA/npm","$env:LOCALAPPDATA/nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Directory | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($env:PATH = 'D:/New Folder;' + $env:PATH; Start-Process -FilePath 'D:/New Folder/npm.cmd' -ArgumentList 'run','dev' -WorkingDirectory 'D:/SeedLandV' -WindowStyle Minimized -PassThru | Select-Object Id,ProcessName)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -in @\('electron','node','npm'\) } | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,MainWindowTitle | Sort-Object ProcessName,Id)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'electron|node' } | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,MainWindowTitle | Sort-Object ProcessName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs','D:\\nodejs','C:\\nodejs','D:\\Program Files\\nodejs' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select -First 3; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; $env:NODE_PATH)

PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; node --version; npm --version; Write-Output "---PATH---"; $env:Path -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|npm|nvm' })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== nvm check ==="; Get-Command nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; if \($env:NVM_HOME\) { Write-Output "NVM_HOME=$env:NVM_HOME"; Get-ChildItem $env:NVM_HOME -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize }; if \($env:NVM_SYMLINK\) { Write-Output "NVM_SYMLINK=$env:NVM_SYMLINK" }; Write-Output "`n=== common install paths ==="; $paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs","$env:APPDATA\\nvm","$env:ProgramData\\nvm","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvs","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm","$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs","$env:USERPROFILE\\.volta"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Force | Select-Object -First 10 Name | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { Write-Output "missing: $p" } })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== User PATH \(persisted\) ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\) -split ';'; Write-Output "`n=== Machine PATH \(persisted\) ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) -split ';')

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== 检查常见安装位置 ==="; $candidates = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:ProgramData\\nvm","$env:APPDATA\\nvm","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs\\current\\node.exe"\); foreach \($p in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "`n=== 读取最新持久化 PATH \(User+Machine\) ==="; $newPath = \([Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\)\); \($newPath -split ';'\) | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|npm|nvm' }; Write-Output "`n=== 用最新 PATH 跑 node/npm ==="; $env:Path = $newPath; try { & node --version } catch { Write-Output "node 仍然不可用: $_" }; try { & npm --version } catch { Write-Output "npm 仍然不可用: $_" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== 改前 ==="; Get-ExecutionPolicy -List | Format-Table -AutoSize; Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope CurrentUser -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Force; Write-Output "=== 改后 ==="; Get-ExecutionPolicy -List | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== 在新子进程里验证 npm ==="; & powershell -NoProfile -Command "`$env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); node --version; npm --version")

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); Set-Location D:\\SeedLandV; Write-Output "=== node/npm version ==="; node --version; npm --version; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== npm install ==="; npm install 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 60)
PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); Set-Location D:\\SeedLandV; npm run dev 2>&1)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== electron binary ==="; $e = "D:\\SeedLandV\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe"; if \(Test-Path $e\) { Get-Item $e | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime } else { Write-Output "MISSING electron.exe" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== electron package path.txt ==="; $pt = "D:\\SeedLandV\\node_modules\\electron\\path.txt"; if \(Test-Path $pt\) { Get-Content $pt } else { Write-Output "MISSING path.txt" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== installed versions ==="; \(Get-Content "D:\\SeedLandV\\node_modules\\electron\\package.json" | ConvertFrom-Json\).version; \(Get-Content "D:\\SeedLandV\\node_modules\\@electron-toolkit\\utils\\package.json" | ConvertFrom-Json\).version)

PowerShell($candidates = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs", "C:\\nodejs", "$env:USERPROFILE\\nvm", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.nvm", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm", "$env:ProgramData\\nvm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm", "$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { "EXISTS: $c"; Get-ChildItem $c -Filter "node.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 FullName } })
